name: ado_run_test_pipeline
description: Push the pod's current branch to a pre-configured test repo and trigger an ADO pipeline against it. The pod sees no secrets — the test pipeline owns its own ADO variable groups. Use for fast integration validation of pipeline code (e.g. Dagger pipelines) before pushing to the real target branch.

name: ado_get_test_run_status
description: Long-poll (up to 5 min) the status of a test pipeline run previously kicked off by ado_run_test_pipeline. Returns status, URL, duration, and a log tail on failure.

timeout_seconds.description: Max seconds to long-poll before returning 'inProgress'. Default 300.
